title: [1.7.1] Doctor section headers translated via t()
description: F23: cli/doctor.ts:72-74 hardcoded English section headers ('Fixable errors:', 'Manual errors:', 'Warnings:') break zh-CN output. Wrap in t() via existing i18n helper.

files.change: Lines 72-74: wrap section headers with t() from existing i18n module; add 3 keys to en + zh-CN translations
Add Chinese translations for the 3 new keys

criteria: Doctor section headers go through t()
zh-CN run shows fully Chinese output (no jarring English)
